Good morning Benjamin,

The apartment you have expressed interest in is unfortunately not available at the moment. We will have another 2 bedroom in the future, but do not have a specific date yet for when it will be coming available. We do currently have availability in our 1 bedrooms if that’s something you’d be interested in.

Thank you,


Grays Landing
Email: grayslanding@reachcdc.org

[cid:reachlogopms286c2_c401b797-c2cb-4800-9e3a-f2fe5d9f54c7.png]        <https://www.facebook.com/reachcdc>
<https://www.twitter.com/reachcdc>
 Learn more about our impactful work here.<https://reachcdc.org>

Sent: Sunday, March 29, 2026 8:20 PM
To: Grays Landing <grayslanding@reachcdc.org>
Subject: Urgent, this RentCafe ILS prospect needs to move on 03/31/2026.
